---
title: "cositos counter (static)"
format: html
---

A cositos widget rendered statically by Quarto.

The widget-state `Document` must be present in this document's
`metadata.widgets["application/vnd.jupyter.widget-state+json"]` for the widget to render
without a kernel. Build it with `cositos.serialize.dump_document(...)` and inject it (see
`../build.py`) after executing, then `quarto render`.

```{python}
#| echo: false
from cositos import Widget
from cositos.jupyter import CommTransport

state = {
    "_esm": "export default { render({ model, el }) { el.textContent = 'count = ' + model.get('n'); } }",
    "n": 3,
}
w = Widget(CommTransport(), get_state=lambda: dict(state))
w  # displays the widget-view mimebundle (Widget._repr_mimebundle_)
```
